mapper.select: SELECT o.order_id, o.member_idx, o.order_date, o.total_price, o.status, oi.book_id, MIN(b.book_title) AS book_title, MIN(b.cover_image) AS book_cover, COUNT(*) AS book_count, p.pay_method AS payment_method, p.used_points AS used_point, CEIL(o.total_price * 0.1) AS earned_point, d.receiver_name, d.receiver_phone, d.zipcode, d.delivery_address, d.address_detail, d.memo, d.status_code, d.tracking_number FROM orders o JOIN orderitem oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id JOIN book b ON oi.book_id = b.book_id JOIN payment p ON o.order_id = p.order_id JOIN delivery d ON o.order_id = d.order_id WHERE o.order_id = #{order_id} AND o.member_idx = #{member_idx} GROUP BY o.order_id, o.member_idx, o.order_date, o.total_price, o.status, oi.book_id, p.pay_method, p.used_points, d.receiver_name, d.receiver_phone, d.zipcode, d.delivery_address, d.address_detail, d.memo, d.status_code, d.tracking_number

SELECT o.order_id, o.member_idx, o.order_date, o.total_price, o.status, MIN(b.book_id) AS book_id, MIN(b.book_title) AS book_title, MIN(b.cover_image) AS book_cover, COUNT(*) AS book_count, MIN(d.status_code) AS delivery_status FROM orders o JOIN orderitem oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id JOIN book b ON oi.book_id = b.book_id JOIN delivery d ON o.order_id = d.order_id WHERE o.member_idx = #{member_idx} GROUP BY o.order_id ORDER BY o.order_id DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{perPageNum}

SELECT o.order_id, o.member_idx, o.order_date, o.total_price, o.status, m.member_id, m.member_name, MIN(b.book_title) AS book_title, MIN(b.cover_image) AS book_cover, COUNT(*) AS book_count, p.pay_method AS payment_method, p.used_points AS used_point, CEIL(o.total_price * 0.1) AS earned_point, d.receiver_name, d.receiver_phone, d.zipcode, d.delivery_address, d.address_detail, d.memo, d.status_code, d.tracking_number FROM orders o JOIN member m ON o.member_idx = m.member_idx JOIN orderitem oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id JOIN book b ON oi.book_id = b.book_id JOIN payment p ON o.order_id = p.order_id JOIN delivery d ON o.order_id = d.order_id WHERE o.order_id = #{order_id} GROUP BY o.order_id, o.member_idx, o.order_date, o.total_price, o.status, m.member_id, m.member_name, p.pay_method, p.used_points, d.receiver_name, d.receiver_phone, d.zipcode, d.delivery_address, d.address_detail, d.memo, d.status_code, d.tracking_number

SELECT o.order_id, o.member_idx, o.order_date, o.total_price, o.status, m.member_id, m.member_name, MIN(b.book_title) AS book_title, MIN(b.cover_image) AS book_cover, COUNT(*) AS book_count FROM orders o JOIN member m ON o.member_idx = m.member_idx JOIN orderitem oi ON o.order_id = oi.order_id JOIN book b ON oi.book_id = b.book_id GROUP BY o.order_id ORDER BY o.order_id DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM orders WHERE member_idx = #{member_idx}
